self_consistency_on_synthetic_daily.method: Prophet cross-validation on 365-day synthetic daily data
self_consistency_on_synthetic_daily.note: Self-consistency check on synthetic daily data. Not a true hold-out test.

honest_holdout_backtest.method: Train on 2024-2025 seeded monthly data, predict 2026 hold-out
honest_holdout_backtest.note: DEMO — synthetic monthly data calibrated with real AR demand patterns. Conservative Prophet settings (flat growth, changepoint_prior_scale=0.001) used for sparse reagents to prevent trend extrapolation.
